note: WDLL 51. Taylor Made LDC place-type rows transcribed from the City-adopted LDC at https://www.taylortx.gov/DocumentCenter/View/14244/Taylor-Land-Development-Code---Revised-091224, ??4.3.1.2 and 4.3.1.4?.8 (pages 4-126 through 4-132; accessed 2026-07-23). front_ft is the lower bound of the stated build-to-line range. The LDC does not prescribe scalar side/rear zoning setbacks for these Place Types: 0 is a non-binding sentinel, not an asserted entitlement; Chapter 5 requires building-code separation at side/rear property lines. side_corner_ft and max_height_ft are non-binding sentinels, with height stated in stories rather than feet. OMITTED: EC and CS (TBD until an Employment Center Plan/development process), all building-type/frontage, plan, alley, and building-code separation conditions.

front_ft.quote: Taylor LDC 4.3.1.2 P2: build-to-line range starts at 10 ft.; the place-type sheet does not state numeric side or rear zoning setbacks, which are subject to building-code separation.
